verbGlossary.OPENED FOR: {source} is created to record a day's field activity during {target}
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTS: {source} narratively records field conditions, progress, or issues occurring in {target}
verbGlossary.TRACKS LABOR DURING: {source} captures trade headcount and worker-hours present on site during {target}
verbGlossary.MOBILIZED FOR: {source}is assembled and deployed to the jobsite to perform work in a specific {target}
verbGlossary.DELAYS: {source} entry records lost time or schedule impact to {target} from weather, material, or other causes
verbGlossary.LOGGED DURING: {source}is recorded on {target} while a phase is active
verbGlossary.RECORDS HOURS DURING: {source} captures machine operating hours consumed during {target}
verbGlossary.RECORDS RECEIPT DURING: {source} entry documents material arrival on site during {target}
verbGlossary.SHIPS DURING: Material shipment leaves fabricator or supplier during the procurement or delivery {target}
verbGlossary.RECEIVED DURING: {source} is signed for on site during the active {target}
verbGlossary.CITED DURING: {source} is issued for a hazard observed while {target} is under way
verbGlossary.REPORTED DURING: Accident, incident, or distribution metric is formally recorded during an active {target}
verbGlossary.INSPECTED DURING: {source} entry records a jurisdictional or third-party inspection occurring in {target}
verbGlossary.MEASURES OUTPUT DURING: {source} captures units installed or completed per labor-hour during {target}
verbGlossary.TALLIED DURING: {source} records cumulative installed quantities for pay or progress during {target}
verbGlossary.REGISTERED DURING: {source} records non-crew personnel entering the site during {target}
verbGlossary.DISPOSED DURING: {source} entry records debris or demolition material removed from site during {target}
verbGlossary.HAULED DURING: {source} tracks container pulls and disposal loads during {target}
verbGlossary.PLANNED FOR: {source} identifies the day's planned activities for a given {target}
verbGlossary.LINKED TO: Scheduled work task link ties a daily log work item back to a schedule task in {target}
verbGlossary.AUTHORIZED DURING: T&M ticket is approved for extra or out-of-scope work performed during {target}
verbGlossary.CHARGED DURING: T&M labor, equipment, or material entry records billable cost incurred during {target}
verbGlossary.CLOCKED DURING: {source} entry records individual worker start and stop times during {target}
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED TO: {source}assignment is made to perform work in a specific {target}
verbGlossary.REQUESTED FOR: {source} is submitted to secure additional trade labor needed for {target}
verbGlossary.SUMMARIZES: {source} entry provides a narrative or metric summary of progress within {target}
verbGlossary.DISTRIBUTED FOR: {source} is compiled and sent to stakeholders covering activity in {target}
verbGlossary.COORDINATED DURING: {source} records coordination calls with subcontractors or suppliers during {target}
verbGlossary.MEASURED DURING: {source} captures real output achieved during {target} for earned-value tracking
verbGlossary.BASELINED FOR: Budgeted production quantity sets the planned output target for {target}
verbGlossary.EVALUATED DURING: {source} productivity record compares actual vs. budgeted output rates during {target}
verbGlossary.ONBOARDED DURING: {source}record is activated when a worker enters the project during orientation
verbGlossary.RELEASED DURING: {source}record is deactivated when a worker demobilizes at {target} completion or closeout
verbGlossary.PEAKS DURING: {source} identifies the maximum workforce deployed during {target}
verbGlossary.AVERAGED DURING: Average daily headcount metric computes mean workforce level across {target}
verbGlossary.COUNTED DURING: {source} tallies the number of delay events recorded during {target}
verbGlossary.IMPACTS: {source}rate quantifies lost days as a percentage of working days in {target}
verbGlossary.RATED DURING: {source} measures active-use hours vs. available hours during {target}
verbGlossary.TRACKED DURING: {source} measures recycled vs. total waste volume during {target}
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED DURING: {source} measures how consistently logs are filed during {target}
verbGlossary.SCORED DURING: {source} measures weekly planned-vs-completed task ratio during {target}
